chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C. P. No. D-5392 of 2025 (Yousuf Amin Vs. Federation of Pakistan & Others) Petitioner: Through Mr. Hamza Yousuf, Advocate. Respondent No. 1: Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Respondents 2 & 3: Through Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate. Date of hearing: 13-11-2025 Date of order: 13-11-2025 O R D E R Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J. - The grievance of the petitioner is that against suspension of his Clearing Agent License, he has preferred an Appeal before the Chief Collector of Customs under Rule 103 of the Customs Rules 2001; that though the Appeal was filed as far back as July 2025, the same has not even been taken up for hearing. Therefore, we dispose of this petition by directing respondent No. 2 to hear the petitioner and the department and decide aforesaid appeal within a period of 30 days. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
